ip_outcome_note: Confirmed via PokemonTCG.io swsh4-13. National Pokedex no. 290 matches. Small white larval insect in subterranean root setting is canonical Nincada design.

trivia_bullets.text: Nincada appears in Sword & Shield — Vivid Voltage (2020) as no. 013/185, a Common. National Pokedex no. 290, Bug/Ground-type, introduced in Generation III (Hoenn).

Nincada is the only Pokemon in the franchise whose evolution produces two Pokemon simultaneously. At level 20 it evolves into Ninjask; if the player has an empty party slot AND a Poke Ball in their bag, the shed exoskeleton automatically becomes Shedinja in that Poke Ball. The mechanic has been present since Gen III and remains unique to this line.

Shedinja has exactly 1 HP and Wonder Guard (immune to all non-super-effective damage). Only Fire, Flying, Rock, Ghost, and Dark can hit it. Lore-consistent: it is a hollow shell with no life force of its own.
"Because it lived almost entirely underground, it is nearly blind. It uses its antennae instead."

related_cards.name: Ninjask
related_cards.note: Primary evolution at level 20, fast Bug/Flying-type

related_cards.name: Shedinja
related_cards.note: Secondary simultaneous evolution, 1 HP + Wonder Guard
